sections_cited: section 133 of the Income Tax Ordinance

chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI Income Tax Reference Application No. 367 of 2023 ___________________________________________________________ DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE(S) ___________________________________________________________ 1. For order on office objection No. 24. 2. For order on CMA No. 549/2023 (Exemption) 3. For hearing of main case. 06.11.2025 Mr. Ghazi Khan Khalil, advocate for applicant. Learned counsel states that the questions pleaded for determination are already decided against the department by the Supreme Court in the case of Millat Tractors Limited reported as 2024 SCMR 700. In view hereof, he states that there is no case for this Court to entertain, therefore, the reference application is being withdrawn. Accordingly, the application is hereby dismissed as withdrawn. A copy of this decision may be sent under the seal of this Court and the signature of the Registrar to the learned Appellate Tribunal, as required per section 133 of the Income Tax Ordinance, 2001. Judge Judge Ayaz p.s.
